project.description:
Triggers xcloud performance regression tests on weekly basis every Sunday at 01:00 UTC
Runs comprehensive throughput and latency performance tests on xcloud staging backend to establish baselines and detect regressions.
Ref: https://scylladb.atlassian.net/browse/QAINFRA-38

hudson.plugins.parameterizedtrigger.Pred.properties: scylla_version=release:latest provision_type=on_demand region=us-east-1 xcloud_provider=aws xcloud_env=staging post_behavior_db_nodes=destroy post_behavior_loader_nodes=destroy post_behavior_monitor_nodes=destroy requested_by_user=dimakr
